AEMEATH_STRIKE.title: Strike
AEMEATH_GUARD.title: Defend
AEMEATH_GUARD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Apply {FusionBurst:diff()} Fusion Burst to a random enemy.
AEMEATH_OVERLOAD.title: Overload
AEMEATH_OVERLOAD.description: Spend {IfUpgraded:show:[green]5[/green]|7}[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Give all Strikes and Defends Shock Resonance. Exhaust.
AEMEATH_LIGHT_SONG.title: Light Song
AEMEATH_FRAME_WARMUP.title: Frame Warmup
AEMEATH_HOW_CAN_YOU_SLEEP.title: How Can You Sleep?
AEMEATH_HOW_CAN_YOU_SLEEP.description: [gold]Resonance Break[/gold]. If it triggers successfully, Stun that enemy.
AEMEATH_STARDUST.title: Stardust
AEMEATH_STARBURST.title: Starburst
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_STARS.title: Between Stars
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_STARS.description: Choose up to 2 cards in your hand. They gain Shock Resonance this combat.
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_STARS.selectionScreenPro: Choose up to 2 cards to gain Shock Resonance
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_STARS_SKILL.title: Between Stars
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_STARS_SKILL.description: Choose up to 2 cards in your hand. They gain Shock Resonance this combat.
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_STARS_SKILL.selectionScr: Choose up to 2 cards to gain Shock Resonance
AEMEATH_TONIGHT_THE_STAR_SEA_IS_CLEAR.ti: Tonight, the Star Sea Is Clear
AEMEATH_TONIGHT_THE_STAR_SEA_IS_CLEAR.de: Exhaust. Retain. Spend 4[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. During this combat, whenever you spend 1[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img], this card triggers 1 additional unconditional Resonance Break when played. (Currently triggers {RuptureCount} time(s).)
AEMEATH_COMMAND_DISMANTLE.title: Command: Dismantle
AEMEATH_COMMAND_DISMANTLE.description: Choose up to {IfUpgraded:show:[green]X+1[/green]|X} cards in your hand and Exhaust them. For each card Exhausted, draw 1 card and gain 1 Energy. Exhaust.
AEMEATH_COMMAND_DISMANTLE.selectionScree: Choose cards to Exhaust (up to X)
AEMEATH_CALL_OF_DAWN.title: Call of Dawn
AEMEATH_CALL_OF_DAWN.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Melt[/gold] 1. Apply {IfUpgraded:show:[green]2[/green]|1} Off Tune. [gold]Resonance Break[/gold].
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_DETONATE_TEST.title: Fusion Burst Detonate Test (Deprecated)
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_DETONATE_TEST.descr: Deprecated test card. Manual detonation has been removed from the Fusion Burst system.
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_TEST.title: Fusion Burst Test
AEMEATH_LUMINOUS_DASH.title: Luminous Dash
AEMEATH_ANONYMOUS_COMMENT.title: Anonymous Comment
AEMEATH_CLUSTER_SHOT.title: Cluster Shot
AEMEATH_WANDER_WANDER.title: Wander~Wander~
AEMEATH_COMMAND_SHOOT.title: Command: Shoot
AEMEATH_COMMAND_SHOOT.description: Spend X[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {IfUpgraded:show:[green]X+1[/green]|X} times. If X >= 8, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_EXAM_OVER.title: Exam Over~
AEMEATH_EXAM_OVER.description: Spend 3[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Draw 1 extra card next turn.
AEMEATH_PROPULSION_MODE.title: Propulsion Mode
AEMEATH_CLEAR_CACHE.title: Clear Cache
AEMEATH_CLEAR_CACHE.description: Retain. Exhaust. Spend {IfUpgraded:show:[green]6[/green]|8}[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img] and draw {Cards} cards.
AEMEATH_CARD28.title: name28
AEMEATH_CARD28.description: At the end of your turn, gain {Sync:diff()}[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_INTERFERENCE_FIELD.title: Interference Field
AEMEATH_INTERFERENCE_FIELD.description: At the start of your turn, apply 3 Off Tune to all enemies.
AEMEATH_RESONANCE_DEXTERITY.title: Resonance Dexterity
AEMEATH_RESONANCE_DEXTERITY.description: At the start of your turn, gain 2 Dexterity.
AEMEATH_TOUCH_THE_STARS.title: Touch the Stars
AEMEATH_TOUCH_THE_STARS.description: Spend 2[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. Choose a card in your hand. It gains Shock Resonance, then discard it. Add {Copies:diff()} copies of it to your discard pile. The copies also gain Shock Resonance.
AEMEATH_TOUCH_THE_STARS.selectionScreenP: Choose a card to grant Shock Resonance and discard
AEMEATH_STARSTRING_LIGHT.title: Stringlight
AEMEATH_RESONANT_STRING.title: Resonant String
AEMEATH_RESONANT_STRING.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If the target already has Off Tune, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Apply {Detune:diff()} Off Tune.
AEMEATH_SPECTRAL_ANALYSIS.title: Spectral Analysis
AEMEATH_SPECTRAL_ANALYSIS.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Choose {Cards:diff()} cards in your hand to discard. The discarded cards gain Shock Resonance.
AEMEATH_SPECTRAL_ANALYSIS.selectionScree: Choose cards to discard and grant Shock Resonance
AEMEATH_AFTERRING.title: Floating Feather Convergence
AEMEATH_PROPULSION_MODE1.title: Snapstring
AEMEATH_PROPULSION_MODE4.title: Collapse
AEMEATH_PROPULSION_MODE4.description: Spend 4[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. [gold]Resonance Break[/gold]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If it triggers successfully, draw 2 cards.{IfUpgraded:show: Retain.|}
AEMEATH_SYSTEM_HACK.title: System Hack
AEMEATH_SYSTEM_HACK.description: Apply {IfUpgraded:show:[green]5[/green]|3} Fusion Burst and {IfUpgraded:show:[green]5[/green]|3} Weak to ALL enemies.
AEMEATH_WEAK_POINT_BREAKTHROUGH.title: Weak Point Breakthrough
AEMEATH_WEAK_POINT_BREAKTHROUGH.descript: Double the target's Off Tune.{IfUpgraded:show:| Exhaust.}
AEMEATH_CHARGE_CHARGE.title: Charge! Chaaaaarge!
AEMEATH_CHARGE_CHARGE.description: Innate. Apply {Detune:diff()} Off Tune to an enemy. Gain {Block:diff()} Block.
AEMEATH_FULL_SPECTRUM_SCAN.title: Full-Spectrum Scan
AEMEATH_FULL_SPECTRUM_SCAN.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Exhaust all Attack cards. Exhaust. While in the exhaust pile, when any enemy triggers Auto-Burst, add this to your hand.
AEMEATH_GRAVITY_DEPLOYMENT.title: Gravity Deployment
AEMEATH_GRAVITY_DEPLOYMENT.description: At the start of your turn, if any enemy is in Interference, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. You deal +{BonusDamage:diff()} damage to Interference targets.
AEMEATH_DISSONANT_INTERVAL.title: Dissonant Interval
AEMEATH_DISSONANT_INTERVAL.description: Spend 1[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. Apply {Interference:diff()} Interference to an enemy.
AEMEATH_DEADLINE_DISCO.title: Deadline Disco
AEMEATH_DEADLINE_DISCO.description: Spend [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. Reduce the target's Off Tune max by {IfUpgraded:show:[green]5[/green]|3} (to a minimum of 5).
AEMEATH_ONE_SLASH.title: One Slash
AEMEATH_ONE_SLASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. Gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_ASSERTION.title: Assertion
AEMEATH_ASSERTION.description: Gain {Sync:diff()}[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies. {IfUpgraded:show:Deal that damage again.|If your current [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img] is odd, deal that damage again.}
AEMEATH_ERADICATE_EVIL.title: Eradicate Evil
AEMEATH_ERADICATE_EVIL.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. For each stack of Interference on the target, deal that damage again.
AEMEATH_ASYNC.title: Async
AEMEATH_MULTITHREADING.title: Multithreading
AEMEATH_MULTITHREADING.description: Draw {Cards} cards and gain {Block:diff()} Block. If you switched forms this turn, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_BARRIER.title: Barrier
AEMEATH_COMPUTE_CONVERGENCE.title: Compute Convergence
AEMEATH_SERIALIZATION.title: Serialization
AEMEATH_SERIALIZATION.description: Gain {Sync}[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. You can't gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img] for the rest of this turn. Exhaust.
AEMEATH_OBSERVE.title: Observe
AEMEATH_OBSERVE.description: Look at the top {Peek:diff()} cards of your draw pile and add 2 of them to your hand.
AEMEATH_OBSERVE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose cards to add to your hand
AEMEATH_RELOAD.title: Reload
AEMEATH_RELOAD.description: Discard your hand, draw that many cards, then gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img] equal to one-third of the cards drawn.
AEMEATH_REFRACTION.title: Refraction
AEMEATH_REFRACTION.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Until your next turn starts, if you don't take damage, gain {Vigor:diff()} Vigor at the start of your next turn.
AEMEATH_RECONSTRUCT.title: Reconstruct
AEMEATH_RECONSTRUCT.description: Choose an exhausted card and shuffle it into your draw pile.
AEMEATH_RECONSTRUCT.selectionScreenPromp: Choose an exhausted card to shuffle into your draw pile
AEMEATH_ELECTRONIC_CAMOUFLAGE.title: Electronic Camouflage
AEMEATH_ELECTRONIC_SEA.title: Electronic Sea
AEMEATH_ELECTRONIC_SEA.description: Power. Whenever you cumulatively spend 8[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img], gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img].
AEMEATH_UNFINISHED_SONG.title: Unfinished Song
AEMEATH_UNFINISHED_SONG.description: At the end of each turn, trigger [gold]Melt[/gold] once on all enemies.
AEMEATH_UNDER_THE_MELTING_NIGHT_SKY.desc: The Fusion Burst you apply is doubled, but whenever you successfully apply Fusion Burst, take {SelfDamage:diff()} damage.
AEMEATH_RECALIBRATION.title: Recalibration
AEMEATH_RECALIBRATION.description: Remove all Interference from the target. Gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img] for each stack removed.
AEMEATH_ECHO.title: Echo
AEMEATH_ECHO.description: Whenever you play a card, apply 1 Fusion Burst to a random enemy.
AEMEATH_TRAJECTORY_FUSION_BURST.title: Trajectory: Fusion Burst
AEMEATH_TRAJECTORY_FUSION_BURST.descript: Gain {Trajectory:diff()} Fusion Burst Trajectory. Fusion Burst Trajectory: each stack increases your Fusion Burst auto-burst damage by 1%.
AEMEATH_TARGET_LOCKED.title: Target Locked
AEMEATH_TARGET_LOCKED.description: Whenever you apply Off Tune, apply {IfUpgraded:show:[green]3[/green]|2} extra Off Tune.
AEMEATH_SELF_CHECK.title: Regeneration
AEMEATH_ENCORE.title: encore
AEMEATH_ENCORE.description: End your turn. Gain an extra turn. If in Exostrider form, trigger Enstage.{IfUpgraded:show: Retain.|}
AEMEATH_PROBABILITY_CLOUD.title: Probability Cloud
AEMEATH_PROBABILITY_CLOUD.description: Until your next turn starts, you have a {IfUpgraded:show:[green]70%[/green]|50%} chance to avoid damage. Cannot stack.
AEMEATH_FLOATING_STARSEA.title: Floating Starsea
AEMEATH_SET_SAIL.title: Set Sail
AEMEATH_PHANTOM_ENSTAGE.title: Phantom Enstage
AEMEATH_ANONYMOUS_BLESSING.title: Anonymous Blessing
AEMEATH_ANONYMOUS_BLESSING.description: Gain 3 [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img]. Gain {Vigor:diff()} Vigor. Choose {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} card(s) from your draw pile and add them to your hand. They cost 0 [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img] until played this turn.
AEMEATH_ANONYMOUS_BLESSING.selectionScre: Choose a card to add to your hand
AEMEATH_SHINING_ENSTAGE.title: Shining Enstage
AEMEATH_INFINITY_CALIBRATION.title: Infinity Calibration
AEMEATH_INFINITY_CALIBRATION.description: If you are in Aemeath form, deal {AemeathDamage:diff()} damage. Otherwise, deal {ExostriderDamage:diff()} damage, draw {Cards} card, and refund the [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img] spent to play this card.
AEMEATH_OVERTURE_OF_DEPARTURE.title: Overture of Departure
AEMEATH_OVERTURE_OF_DEPARTURE.descriptio: If you switched forms this turn, retain your hand for 1 turn.
AEMEATH_TOWARDS_THE_DAYBREAK.title: Hyperfrequency Cannon
AEMEATH_TOWARDS_THE_DAYBREAK.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Apply {FusionBurst} Fusion Burst.
AEMEATH_SILENT_PROTECTION.title: Silent Protection
AEMEATH_SILENT_PROTECTION.description: Whenever you apply Fusion Burst, gain {Amount:diff()} Block.
AEMEATH_TO_SCULPT_THE_SILENCE.title: Sculpt the Silence
AEMEATH_TO_SCULPT_THE_SILENCE.descriptio: Whenever Descend or Enstage triggers, gain {Amount:diff()} Strength. Remove that Strength at end of turn.
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_THE_STARS.title: Lightwing Ensemble
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_THE_STARS.description: Whenever Descend triggers, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. Whenever Enstage triggers, draw {Cards:diff()} extra cards.
AEMEATH_LIGHTWING_ENSEMBLE.title: Lightwing Ensemble
AEMEATH_LIGHTWING_ENSEMBLE.description: Whenever Descend triggers, gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_star_tip_icon.png[/img]. Whenever Enstage triggers, draw {Cards:diff()} extra cards.
AEMEATH_ULTIMATE_VFX_TEST.title: Ultimate VFX Test
AEMEATH_ULTIMATE_VFX_TEST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Play Aemeath's ultimate sword-and-fire VFX.
AEMEATH_TUNDRA_TYRANT.title: Tundra Tyrant
AEMEATH_TUNDRA_TYRANT.description: Whenever Resonance Break triggers, apply {Weak:diff()} Weak to that enemy.
AEMEATH_WHEN_SNOW_MELTS.title: When Snow Melts
AEMEATH_WHEN_SNOW_MELTS.description: Whenever Resonance Break triggers, draw {IfUpgraded:show:[green]3[/green]|2} cards.
AEMEATH_FINALE.title: Finale
AEMEATH_FINALE.description: Exhaust. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this kills an enemy, choose an Attack card in your deck. Permanently increase that card's base damage by 1 this run.
AEMEATH_FINALE.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose an Attack card to permanently gain +1 base damage
AEMEATH_DRIVING_LESSON.title: Driving Lesson
AEMEATH_DRIVING_LESSON.description: [gold]Descend[/gold]. When you switch forms or when this card is retained, this costs [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img]-1 this combat.
AEMEATH_COME_HERE_LITTLE_ONE.title: Come Here, Little One
AEMEATH_COME_HERE_LITTLE_ONE.description: Exhaust. Spend 3[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. All players gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img] and draw 2 cards. Apply 2 Off Tune to a random enemy 3 times.{IfUpgraded:show: Innate.|}
AEMEATH_HIJACK.title: Hijack
AEMEATH_HIJACK.description: Remove all Artifact. Apply 2 Interference. For each Artifact removed this way, apply 1 additional Interference.
AEMEATH_FIRE_SUPPRESSION.title: Fire Suppression
AEMEATH_FIRE_SUPPRESSION.description: Only playable in Exostrider form. Trigger 2 unconditional Resonance Breaks on the target.
AEMEATH_HOMEWORK_RUSH.title: Homework Rush
AEMEATH_FIRST_LIGHT.title: First Light
AEMEATH_FIRST_LIGHT.description: Gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img]. All enemies gain +3 Fusion Burst cap. Apply 3 Fusion Burst.
AEMEATH_FROM_ABOVE.title: From Above
AEMEATH_FROM_ABOVE.description: Spend 3[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. [gold]Enstage[/gold]. Apply {Vulnerable:diff()} Vulnerable and {Weak:diff()} Weak to ALL enemies.
AEMEATH_SOLAR_FLARE.title: Solar Flare
AEMEATH_SOLAR_FLARE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Target gains +3 Fusion Burst cap. Apply 3 Fusion Burst.
AEMEATH_ETCHING.title: Etching
AEMEATH_ETCHING.description: Apply {FusionBurst:diff()} Fusion Burst. If this triggers Auto-Burst, apply an extra {ExtraBurst:diff()}.
AEMEATH_SPOTLIGHT_READY.title: Spotlight Ready
AEMEATH_FLOWFIRE_SKYBRAND.title: Flowfire, Scorchmark Across Heaven and Earth
AEMEATH_FLOWFIRE_SKYBRAND.description: Spend X[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Trigger [gold]Melt[/gold] on the target {IfUpgraded:show:[green](X+3)[/green]|X} times.
AEMEATH_BURN_TO_VOID.title: Burn to Void
AEMEATH_BURN_TO_VOID.description: Spend [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Exhaust all Status and Curse cards in your draw pile, discard pile, and hand. For each card exhausted this way, gain {Block} Block and apply {FusionBurst:diff()} Fusion Burst to a random enemy.
AEMEATH_PRE_EXAM_ASSAULT.title: Pre-Exam Assault
AEMEATH_PRACTICE_TIME.title: Practice Time
AEMEATH_PRACTICE_TIME.description: Spend 1[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Then gain Block equal to half of the target's current Fusion Burst cap.
AEMEATH_CHORUS.title: Chorus
AEMEATH_CHORUS.description: Gain [img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img][img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_energy_tip_icon.png[/img]. Double the target's current Fusion Burst cap. Exhaust.
AEMEATH_SILENCE_SCULPTING.title: Silence Sculpting
AEMEATH_SILENCE_SCULPTING.description: Apply {FusionBurst:diff()} Fusion Burst. [gold]Melt[/gold] the target {MeltTimes:diff()} times.
AEMEATH_SPOTLIGHT.title: Spotlight
AEMEATH_SPICY_COMBO.title: Spicy Combo
AEMEATH_SPICY_COMBO.description: You may Exhaust a card from your hand. Apply {IfUpgraded:show:[green]5[/green]|3} Fusion Burst to a random enemy.
AEMEATH_TWILIGHT_CHRONICLE.title: Twilight Chronicle
AEMEATH_TWILIGHT_CHRONICLE.description: Power. For the rest of combat, Fusion Burst can no longer auto-burst from reaching cap. At the start of each turn, draw 1 card. At end of turn, choose up to 3 cards in your hand and Exhaust them.{IfUpgraded:show: Retain.|}
AEMEATH_TWILIGHT_CHRONICLE.selectionScre: Choose up to 3 cards to Exhaust
AEMEATH_CORE_CHRONICLE.title: Core Chronicle
AEMEATH_CORE_CHRONICLE.description: At the start of your turn, all enemies gain +6 Fusion Burst cap, then 6 Fusion Burst. Add a Burn to your discard pile.{IfUpgraded:show: Innate.|}
AEMEATH_CORE_BLAZE.title: Core Blaze
AEMEATH_CORE_BLAZE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Increase the target's Fusion Burst cap by {FusionBurst:diff()}, then apply {FusionBurst:diff()} Fusion Burst.
AEMEATH_MOMENT_OF_SALVATION.title: The Hour of Salvation Is Here
AEMEATH_MOMENT_OF_SALVATION.description: {IfUpgraded:show:Trigger [green]4[/green] unconditional Resonance Breaks.|}When played, trigger 1 additional unconditional Resonance Break for each time you switched forms this combat. (Currently triggers {RuptureCount} time(s).)
AEMEATH_CRITICAL_PROTOCOL.title: Activate Critical Protocol
AEMEATH_CRITICAL_PROTOCOL.description: Gain {Sync}[img]res://aemeath-ww/ui/hover_tips/aemeath_sync_tip_icon.png[/img]. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Resonance Field[/gold] to your discard pile.
AEMEATH_RESONANCE_FIELD.title: Resonance Field
AEMEATH_RESONANCE_FIELD.description: Exhaust. Apply {Detune:diff()} Off Tune. Draw {Cards} cards. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
AEMEATH_LINNAE_SPECTRAL_ANALYSIS.title: Spectral Analysis
AEMEATH_LINNAE_SPECTRAL_ANALYSIS.descrip: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {Block:diff()} Block. Reduce the target's Off Tune max by 1 (minimum 5). When played, add a copy of this card to your discard pile.
AEMEATH_VIRTUAL_MAGSTORM.title: Virtual Magstorm
AEMEATH_VIRTUAL_MAGSTORM.description: Exhaust. At end of turn, if this is in your hand, lose 1 Max HP for each card in your hand.
SIGILLUM_RETURN_HOME.title: Return Home
SIGILLUM_RETURN_HOME.description: On play, heal yourself 20 HP. At end of turn, if this is in your hand, Sigillum heals 20 HP. Exhaust.
AEMEATH_HAIVIXIA_DRAFT.title: Draft
AEMEATH_HAIVIXIA_DRAFT.description: Satisfy the next type required by Haivixia's Prophecy. Exhaust.
